pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/multistage_dockerfile_optimization/setup_task.sh:23-154 (APP_DIR hardcoded and the Node.js files are written there)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/multistage_dockerfile_optimization/setup_task.sh:156-169 (builds the reference image with this tag)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/multistage_dockerfile_optimization/setup_task.sh:167-183 and README.md:18-29 (task instructions explicitly expect a multi-stage rebuild tagged todo-app:optimized)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/multistage_dockerfile_optimization/setup_task.sh:62,150 (Node app default port and Dockerfile EXPOSE 3000) and README.md:17-19
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/multistage_dockerfile_optimization/README.md:8-29 and verifier.py:36-65 (the README and verifier enforce the <250MB target)

privileged_info_summary: setup_task.sh provisions the official Docker getting-started-app into /home/ga/todo-app (per the Source comment) and the README/verifier insist on rewriting its Dockerfile into a multi-stage build tagged todo-app:optimized that still serves port 3000 while keeping the image under 250 MB compared to the prebuilt todo-app:original.
